---
title: "External archive index"
---

> Files referenced by the archive but **not copied into the repo**
> (too large for git-lfs to carry efficiently, or already represented
> elsewhere). They remain at their original cloud paths — record the
> absolute path so future-you can find them.

## Always-external (vendor + heavy media)

| What | Location |
|---|---|
| _(none yet)_ | TODO: e.g. `C:\Users\you\OneDrive - University\research\vendor-installers` |

## Oversize files skipped from buckets (> 25 MB)

| File | Size | Source |
|---|---|---|
| _(none yet)_ | — | — |
